Authentication Endpoints Webhooks

Installation

Get Notewell up and running in your project with a single command. Supports Node.js 18+ and all major package managers.

npm install notewell --save

Notewell requires Node.js 18 or higher. Check your version with node --version.

System Requirements

Requirement Minimum Recommended
Node.js 18.0 20.x LTS
Memory 256 MB 512 MB
Disk Space 50 MB 200 MB

Next Steps

Once installed, follow the Quick Start guide to create your first note collection. For advanced configuration options, see the Configuration reference.
